_note: Template registry. 'file' is relative to templates/. Tokens are mustache-style {{TOKEN}}, filled by new_post.py. All templates are responsive to the --size flag (the .canvas reads --w/--h). Hand-build for ideas outside these archetypes.

tokens.notes: HEADLINE supports \n for line breaks and inline <em>/<strong>/<mark> (mark = highlighter). Empty content tokens render blank. Templates are STARTING POINTS — pick an aesthetic direction (data/directions.json + scripts/ideate.py) and push the template toward it with motifs from reference/directions.md, or hand-build for directions no template covers.

templates.name: Bold Statement / Quote
templates.use: quotes, hot takes, one-line value props, carousel covers, hooks

templates.name: Announcement / Launch / Promo
templates.use: new drops, launches, sales, events — has eyebrow pill + CTA button

templates.name: Tip / Listicle Slide
templates.use: how-to steps, numbered tips, carousel body slides

templates.name: Stat / Big Number
templates.use: a single impressive metric as the hero

templates.name: Editorial Vintage
templates.use: warm cream-paper editorial: serif headline, orange accent, sketch underline + doodle (direction: editorial-vintage)

templates.name: Blueprint / Diagram
templates.use: technical grid-paper: bold headline with highlighter, connector dots, mono label (direction: blueprint-diagram)

templates.name: Carousel Cover / Hook
templates.use: slide 1 of a carousel: pure hook, huge type, counter pill + swipe cue

templates.name: CTA / End-card
templates.use: last slide of a carousel: one big CTA (follow/save), handle prominent

templates.name: Comparison / VS
templates.use: A-vs-B: dual glass panels + center VS + payoff bar. Chrome token-filled; edit panel labels + 3 rows each + payoff (category: comparison-vs)

templates.name: Feature / Benefit Grid
templates.use: 2x3 icon-card grid of features/benefits. Chrome token-filled; edit the 6 cells (category: feature-grid)

templates.name: Listicle (numbered)
templates.use: 5 numbered points on one slide. Chrome token-filled; edit the rows (category: listicle)

templates.name: Step-by-step Flow
templates.use: 4 connected numbered step cards. Chrome token-filled; edit the steps (category: step-by-step)

templates.name: Checklist / Takeaways
templates.use: Ticked rows + summary chip. Chrome token-filled; SUBHEAD = summary, edit rows (category: checklist)

templates.name: Testimonial (glass)
templates.use: Stars + quote + avatar in a glass panel. HEADLINE = quote; edit name/role (category: testimonial)

templates.name: Profile / Intro
templates.use: Avatar + name + niche tags + bio + follow. HEADLINE = name, SUBHEAD = bio (category: profile-intro)

templates.name: Timeline / Roadmap
templates.use: Vertical connector spine with 4 phase nodes. Chrome token-filled; edit nodes (category: timeline-roadmap)

templates.name: Myth-bust
templates.use: Myth (strike-through) vs Truth blocks. HEADLINE = topic; edit the two lines (category: myth-bust)

templates.name: Benchmark Leaderboard
templates.use: Podium of ranked bars; winner glows, losers desaturate. Edit names/scores (category: benchmark-leaderboard)

templates.name: Before → After
templates.use: 50/50 split, muted before vs vivid after, center VS, transform bar (category: before-after)

templates.name: Product Showcase
templates.use: Hero card staged on a spotlight + floating spec chips. Drop a real screenshot in .hero (category: product-showcase)

templates.name: Lead Magnet
templates.use: Headline + 'what's inside' checklist + taped PDF card + comment CTA. Best with a warm palette (category: lead-magnet)

templates.name: Promo / Offer
templates.use: BIGWORD = the offer (40% OFF / $9). Neo-brutal block + hard shadow + starburst (category: promo-offer)

templates.name: Cheat-sheet
templates.use: Dense 2-col keycap reference + giant ghost glyph. Best with a mono font + dark palette (category: cheatsheet)

templates.name: Index / Contents
templates.use: Numbered table-of-contents with dotted leaders + spiral-binding edge (category: index-contents)

templates.name: Recipe / Formula
templates.use: Two zones: ingredients/inputs + numbered method (category: recipe-card)

templates.name: FAQ / Q&A
templates.use: Stacked question+answer cards with Q/A badges (category: faq-qa)

templates.name: Tool / Resource Roundup
templates.use: Rows of logo + name + one-liner + arrow. Replace logo squares + names (category: tool-roundup)

templates.name: Quote (editorial serif)
templates.use: Big serif pull-quote + giant quote mark. HEADLINE = quote, SUBHEAD = attribution. Best with a serif font (category: quote-statement)

templates.name: Stat Trio
templates.use: Three numbers in a row. Edit the three values + labels (category: stat-number)

templates.name: Diagram Flow
templates.use: Horizontal connected icon cards (A->B->C->D). Edit labels (category: diagram-explainer)

templates.name: Listicle (cards)
templates.use: Vertical stack of accent-bar cards. Edit the 4 cards (category: listicle)

templates.name: Hook Cover (split)
templates.use: Giant headline + accent panel holding BIGWORD/number. Cover (category: hook-cover)

templates.name: Definition / Concept
templates.use: Dictionary entry: HEADLINE = term, SUBHEAD = meaning; edit pron + example. Best with a serif font (category: definition-concept)

templates.name: Stat (neo-brutal)
templates.use: BIGWORD = the number in a hard-shadow block (category: stat-number)

templates.name: Announcement (ticket)
templates.use: Event/launch as a perforated ticket. EYEBROW = label, BIGWORD = date (category: announcement-launch)

templates.name: Mistake / Warning
templates.use: Warning callout: HEADLINE = the mistake, SUBHEAD = why; edit the fix (category: myth-bust)

templates.name: Value Prop Hero
templates.use: Benefit headline + product/mockup zone. Replace .mock with a real screenshot (category: value-prop)

templates.name: Neon Cyber
templates.use: Direction-baked: black + neon glow + scanlines + HUD. Best with a dark neon palette (direction: neon-cyber)

templates.name: Glass Aurora
templates.use: Direction-baked: frosted glass panel over aurora mesh. Best with a vibrant gradient palette (direction: glass-aurora)

templates.name: Memphis Pop
templates.use: Direction-baked: pastel + confetti shapes + squiggle + sticker star. Playful (direction: memphis-pop)

templates.name: Vaporwave Cover
templates.use: Direction-baked: magenta->cyan gradient + perspective grid + sun glow. Centered statement (direction: vaporwave)

templates.name: Swiss Grid
templates.use: Direction-baked: flat, strict hairline grid, one accent, big index. Minimal (direction: swiss-international)

templates.name: Bauhaus Block
templates.use: Direction-baked: primary geometric shapes + thick borders + grid cells (direction: bauhaus-block)

templates.name: Y2K Chrome
templates.use: Direction-baked: chrome metallic type + sparkles + blob. Best with a cool/steel palette (direction: y2k-chrome)

templates.name: Magazine Editorial
templates.use: Direction-baked: drop cap + two columns + pull quote + hairlines. Best with a serif display (direction: magazine-editorial)

templates.name: Mono Terminal
templates.use: Direction-baked: editor/terminal window + // comments + caret. Best with a mono font (direction: mono-terminal)

templates.name: Dark Luxe
templates.use: Direction-baked: near-black + gold accent + centered serif statement + thin rule. Best with a luxe-dark palette (direction: dark-luxe)

templates.name: Riso Print
templates.use: Direction-baked: paper + halftone + 2-ink overprint offset + heavy grain. Best with a warm palette (direction: riso-print)

templates.name: Claymorphism
templates.use: Direction-baked: soft pastel + puffy clay cards (inset+outset shadow). Best with a pastel palette + rounded font (direction: claymorphism)

templates.name: 3D Depth
templates.use: Direction-baked: extruded layered type + deep stacked shadow (direction: 3d-depth)

templates.name: Isometric
templates.use: Direction-baked: faint iso grid + 2.5D cube motif. Technical-friendly (direction: isometric)

templates.name: Paper Craft
templates.use: Direction-baked: layered cut-paper shapes + soft shadows framing a card. Best with a warm palette (direction: paper-craft)

templates.name: Organic Natural
templates.use: Direction-baked: big soft blob + earthy + soft serif. Calm, human. Best with a serif font (direction: organic-natural)

templates.name: Art Deco
templates.use: Direction-baked: gold linework frame + sunburst + symmetric serif caps. Best with dark+gold palette + serif (direction: art-deco)

templates.name: Collage Cutout
templates.use: Direction-baked: torn-paper scraps + tape + halftone + ransom-note type. HEADLINE is the one big word; edit scraps (direction: collage-cutout)

templates.name: Sketch Notebook
templates.use: Direction-baked: dot-grid paper + marker headline + hand-drawn circle/arrow. Best with a handwritten/marker font (direction: sketch-notebook)

templates.name: Grain Gradient
templates.use: Direction-baked: bold duotone gradient + heavy grain + edge-pinned type. Album/poster (direction: grain-gradient)
